responses.response: Fair wages are protected under the Fair Labor Standards Act.
Working hours must comply with local labor regulations.
Workplace safety is mandated by OSHA standards.
Employment discrimination is prohibited under Title VII.
Your labor concern has been noted and will be reviewed.

Workplace safety is mandated by OSHA standards.

Your labor concern has been noted and will be reviewed.
